name: router-vitals
description: Anonymous community status monitor for AnyRouter Claude Code and Codex usage.

scripts.build: pnpm run clean:build && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && node .tsbuild/out/_build/copy-output.mjs
scripts.sync:version: pnpm run build && node scripts/version.mjs sync
scripts.test: pnpm run build && pnpm run check:version && node --test .tsbuild/out/tests/*.test.mjs
